comments: Approved after reviewing tasks/v0.8-readme-overhaul/result-review-packet.json, tasks/v0.8-readme-overhaul/execution-contract.json, and git show for commit d494783. The commit modifies only README.md, README_zh-CN.md, and task artifacts; no src/, bin/, workflow/dispatch.json, or iteration-state.json files were changed. Both README files explain the background problem, the Conceptual Triumvirate, core features, and include concrete Quickstart CLI commands including npm install, init, and MCP startup. Mermaid architecture diagrams are present in both language variants. The implementation matches the documented execution result and remains within the approved documentation-only scope.
